• Web-based MIDI audio visualizer with Tone.js and MidiPlayer.js integration
  • Supports audio file upload, MIDI sequence selection, and real-time pitch/speed adjustment
  • Features offline WAV export, waveform visualization, and shareable configuration links
    const sampler = new Tone.Sampler({ urls: { C4: url } });
    player = new MidiPlayer.Player((event) => { /* trigger notes */ });

This application provides a complete MIDI audio playback system with customizable parameters. Users can upload audio/MIDI files, adjust playback speed and pitch in real-time, visualize the waveform, export to WAV format, and share configurations through URL parameters. The interface includes a modern dark theme with responsive controls and error handling for smooth operation.
